title: BMF Capabilities Registry
description: The set of capabilities recognized at spec version 0.1.0. Each capability is either verified by a reference gateway or declared-only.

humanoid.mixamo24.description: Rig has ≥24 joints and humanoid-landmark score ≥ 90/110.

mesh.singleroot.description: GLB contains ≥1 skinned mesh with a single skeleton root.

anim.breathe.description: Spine (or pelvis) + at least one shoulder chain.

anim.wave.description: Full arm chain on at least one side.

anim.crouch.description: Hips + at least one leg chain.

anim.locomotion.description: Hips + BOTH legs (needed to alternate stride).

phys.muscle.description: Whole-skeleton Hill-type muscle actuator model: each joint is a torque-limited PD actuator whose ceiling is anatomically grounded (specific tension 26.8 N/cm^2, PCSA-derived F_max, force-length + force-velocity per Anderson & Pandy 2007) and whose net motion is muscle torque MINUS gravity torque. Bone positions are the OUTPUT of that force balance, not hand-authored. Runtime contract: client/src/lib/muscleModel.ts. Requires both leg chains so the sim has the load-bearing joints.

params.model: hill-type: F = PCSA * specific_tension; tau = F * moment_arm; live ceiling = peak * forceLength(angle) * forceVelocity(vel)
params.self_consistency: pcsaTorque(joint) approx joint.peakTorqueNm within 1% for all 7 joints (hip/knee/ankle/spine/shoulder/elbow/neck)

phys.stance.description: Quiet-stance solver: the joints a rig rests at when the only loads are body weight + tonic muscle stiffness (muscleModel.standingPose()). Corrects an arbitrary bind-pose crouch to a believable near-straight stand (hip ~0, knee soft-lock ~0.05 rad, ankle flat) instead of leaving the character hunched. Requires hips + both leg chains.

phys.jump.description: Muscle-driven vertical jump: crouch-anticipation, push-off extension, air, and land-absorb are produced by real leg compression/extension through the phys.muscle actuators (grounded|crouch|launch|air|land state machine), not a baked clip. Extensors saturate on launch. Requires hips + both full leg chains including feet.
